tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Complete Mock Test + Final Revision.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Complete Mock Test + Final Revision का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I can now speak English fluently. I have completed this challenge. Seventy-five days ago I could not speak English. Now I don't hesitate to talk on any topic. I speak confidently in the office.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Complete Mock Test + Final Revision.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Complete Mock Test + Final Revision का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I can perform well in an interview. I now have a good understanding of grammar. My vocabulary has increased a lot. I can easily write emails and letters. I can easily do daily conversations.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "यह मेरी सबसे बड़ी उपलब्धि है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "Now I don't hesitate to talk on any topic yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Now I don't hesitate to talk on any topic.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Complete Mock Test + Final Revision.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Complete Mock Test + Final Revision का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: This course has proved very useful in my life. I worked hard every single day. Now I am ready for new opportunities. I am proud of my progress.
